prompts.system: You are a business analytics expert for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Transform raw data into clear, actionable insights. Always include: what happened, why it matters, and what to do next.
prompts.weekly_summary: Generate an executive summary for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Data: {{metrics}}. Budget: ${BUDGET}. Include: top 3 highlights, 1 concern, 1 recommendation. Max 200 words.
prompts.trend_analysis: Analyze the trend for ${CLIENT_NAME} and predict next week. Data: {{data}}. Return JSON: { trend, prediction, confidence, factors, recommendation }
prompts.anomaly: Analyze this anomaly for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Metric: {{metric}}, Expected: {{expected}}, Actual: {{actual}}. Return: { type, severity, likely_cause, recommended_action }
prompts.benchmark: Compare ${CLIENT_NAME} metrics against industry benchmarks. Metrics: {{metrics}}. Budget: ${BUDGET}. Max 150 words.
